raw_consumer_statement: On approximately XX/XX/year> I ordered XXXX airpods online from XXXX. A few days later I recieved the order and opened the box to find they had sent me the wrong item/order. They sent me an XXXX case. I contacted XXXX and they refused to resolve the situation. I then disputed the charge with my Barclays credit card and after several weeks I was told the case was closed in favor of the merchant because they provided tracking and stated that I did not return the merchandise within their XXXX  day return period. Obviously, I disnt have the merchandise to return because I was sent the wrong order. I did provide photos of what was recieved. I also asked to continue the investigation and for arbitration but did not receive a response from Barclays.
